The ideal candidate will have experience in logo design and a strong portfolio showcasing their creativity and attention to detail. The logo should reflect our brand's identity and appeal to our target audience. If you have a passion for design and a keen eye for aesthetics, we would love to hear from you!

title: Company Logo Design
desc: We are seeking a talented graphic designer to create a unique and professional logo for our company. The ideal candidate will have experience in logo design and be able to deliver high-quality, visually appealing designs. The project involves creating a logo that reflects our brand identity and values. The designer should be able to provide multiple concepts and revisions based on feedback.

title: Convert Images to Vector Files
desc: Hello! I need someone to help me take images I have generated and turning them into actual vector files that can be used for embroidery, printing, web, and other applications. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and vector graphics, and be able to deliver high-quality files that meet the requirements for different uses.
